title: Neil the Seal Is Wrecking Cars Again
script: Neil the seal is BACK! Every year, this 2,200-pound elephant seal drags himself onto the beaches of southern Tasmania — and every year the damage report gets weirder. He's flattened traffic cones, snapped fence posts, and this season he picked a new target: headbutting parked Toyotas. Wildlife officers insist it's not aggression, it's practice — young male elephant seals need to spar for dominance, and with no other seals his age around, Neil just picks a car instead. He's turned into a full-blown local celebrity, tracked online like a rockstar on tour. Officials are now begging fans to keep their distance and let him nap in peace. So who's going to tell Neil no?
